2604.11507.title: Deep Learning for Sequential Decision Making under Uncertainty: Foundations, Frameworks, and Frontiers
2604.11507.paper_summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) is moving increasingly beyond prediction to support decisions in complex, uncertain, and dynamic environments. This shift creates a natural intersection with operations research and management sciences (OR/MS), which have long offered conceptual and methodological foundations for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. At the same time, recent advances in deep learning, including feedforward neural networks, LSTMs, transformers, and deep reinforcement learning, have expanded the scope of data-driven modeling and opened new possibilities for large-scale decision systems. This tutorial presents an OR/MS-centered perspective on deep learning for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. Its central premise is that deep learning is valuable not as a replacement for optimization, but as a complement to it. Deep learning brings adaptability and scalable approximation, whereas OR/MS provides the structural rigor needed to represent constraints, recourse, and uncertainty. The tutorial reviews key decision-making foundations, connects them to the major neural architectures in modern AI, and discusses leading approaches to integrating learning and optimization. It also highlights emerging impact in domains such as supply chains, healthcare and epidemic response, agriculture, energy, and autonomous operations. More broadly, it frames these developments as part of a wider transition from predictive AI toward decision-capable AI and highlights the role of OR/MS in shaping the next generation of integrated learning--optimization systems.
2604.11507.paper_summary_zh: 人工智慧 (AI) 正在逐漸超越預測，以支持在複雜、不確定和動態環境中的決策。<lb/>這一轉變自然與運籌學和管理科學 (OR/MS) 交匯，這些領域長期以來為不確定性下的序列決策提供了概念和方法論基礎。<lb/>同時，最近在深度學習方面的進展，包括前饋神經網絡、長短期記憶網絡 (LSTMs)、Transformer和深度強化學習，擴大了數據驅動建模的範疇，並為大規模決策系統開啟了新的可能性。<lb/>本教程提供了一個以 OR/MS 為中心的深度學習視角，用於不確定性下的序列決策。<lb/>其核心前提是，深度學習的價值不在於取代優化，而在於補充優化。<lb/>深度學習帶來了適應性和可擴展的近似，而 OR/MS 則提供了表示約束、補救和不確定性所需的結構嚴謹性。<lb/>本教程回顧了關鍵的決策基礎，將其與現代 AI 中的主要神經架構相連接，並討論了整合學習和優化的主要方法。<lb/>它還突顯了在供應鏈、醫療保健和流行病應對、農業、能源和自主運營等領域的出現影響。<lb/>更廣泛地說，它將這些發展框架為從預測性 AI 向具備決策能力的 AI 的更廣泛過渡，並強調了 OR/MS 在塑造下一代集成學習-優化系統中的角色。
2604.11507.author: I. Esra Buyuktahtakin et.al.
